title: Glick Luxury Christmas Bag Landscape Medium "Merry Christmas" Script Gift Bag for Xmas Wrapping. Measures 22.5 x 17.5 x 10cms, Red, Green, Gold & White
features: Luxury medium gift bags, these are sturdy and will fit most types of medium-sized presents, or multiples of smaller presents. This gift bag will make wrapping those smaller gifts much easier. With over 80 designs and sizes of gift bags to choose from, we have gift wrap for every occasion you need
This gift bag is perfect for him/her at Christmas. It comes with ribbon handles, and a gift tag attached to write your own message on.
Printed on high quality card, a thicker but bendable material, perfect for carrying heavy gifts, or for keeping fragile gifts protected inside
The dimensions of this gift bag are width - 225 x 175 x 100mm. Perfect for those medium-sized gifts, and allows gift wrapping to be done with ease.
You will find everything you need in our wide range of quality printed gift bags of all sizes, wrapping paper, tissue paper, gift wrapping bows and ribbon, gift tags and gift wrapping accessories
description: Our product range includes innovative high quality printed gift wrap, gift tags, gift bags, roll wrap, ribbons, bows, tissue papers and stationery for all seasons and occasions.
